name: The Walking Dead
description: Zombies, survival, and Rick Grimes's group

questions.q: Who created 'The Walking Dead' comic book series that inspired the TV show?

source.notes: Co-created with artist Tony Moore. First issue published October 2003 by Image Comics.

questions.q: Which filmmaker developed the TV adaptation of 'The Walking Dead' for AMC?

source.notes: Known for 'The Shawshank Redemption' and 'The Green Mile.' Fired after Season 2.

questions.q: What is the fictional city where much of 'The Walking Dead' is filmed?

source.notes: Doubles as Woodbury, Alexandria, and other in-show locations. Has become a tourist attraction.

questions.q: Which actor plays Rick Grimes, the protagonist of the show?

source.notes: British actor. Departed the main series in Season 9, returned for spin-off 'The Ones Who Live.'

questions.q: Which actor plays the crossbow-wielding Daryl Dixon?

source.notes: Daryl is an original character not in the comics. Now has his own spin-off series.

questions.q: What was Glenn Rhee's occupation before the apocalypse?

source.notes: Played by Steven Yeun. His knowledge of Atlanta streets makes him a key scavenger.

questions.q: Which actor plays the villainous Negan, who wields a barbed-wire baseball bat named 'Lucille'?

source.notes: First appeared at the end of Season 6. Also plays John Winchester in 'Supernatural.'

questions.q: What is the name of Negan's barbed-wire bat?

source.notes: Named after his late wife. Features prominently in his iconic comic/show debut.

questions.q: What is the name of the sword-wielding survivor played by Danai Gurira?

source.notes: Uses a katana. Travels with two armless walker 'pets' when first introduced.

questions.q: What common slang term is used for the zombies throughout the show?

source.notes: Each community uses different slang: Walkers, Roamers, Geeks, Lurkers, Biters, Dead Ones.

questions.q: Where in Georgia does Rick's group gather in Season 1, hoping for a cure?

source.notes: Centers for Disease Control (CDC) is located there. They head there for hope of a cure.

questions.q: What is the name of Rick Grimes's son?

source.notes: Played by Chandler Riggs. Carl Grimes famously wore his iconic sheriff's hat.

questions.q: What is Rick's profession before the apocalypse?

source.notes: King County Sheriff's Department. Wakes from a coma to find the world overrun in the pilot.

questions.q: What is the name of the prison community in Seasons 3-4?

source.notes: West Georgia Correctional Facility. Home to Rick's group until the Governor's attack.

questions.q: Who is the eye-patched villain who leads the town of Woodbury?

source.notes: Real name Philip Blake. Played by David Morrissey.

questions.q: Whose group of masked antagonists wear walker skin as disguises?

source.notes: Led by Alpha (Samantha Morton) and Beta (Ryan Hurst). Introduced Season 9.

questions.q: What is the name of the safe community introduced in Season 5 with wall-protected streets?

source.notes: Near Washington, D.C. Led by Deanna Monroe when first discovered.

questions.q: What is Rick's best friend and fellow sheriff's deputy's name?

source.notes: Played by Jon Bernthal. Starts an affair with Lori when Rick is in a coma. Killed by Rick in Season 2.

questions.q: Which actress plays Maggie Greene, later Maggie Rhee?

source.notes: Cohan left and returned. Now headlines 'The Walking Dead: Dead City' with Negan.

questions.q: On what cable network did 'The Walking Dead' originally air?

source.notes: Premiered October 31, 2010 (Halloween). Ran 11 seasons until November 2022.
